'''Heilan Rotham''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] professor at the famous [[Lorrd University]] around the time of the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. She was an old, [[wheelchair]]-bound [[Gender/Legends|woman]] with [[Color/Legends|white]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]], pale skin, and blue [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] Rotham's field of specialty was tactile writing and recording methods, and she was considered the top scholar in her field in all of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Rotham once assisted [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] in a translation of a collection of [[Lorrd Artifact|tassels]] left for him as a clue by [[Lumiya|Brisha Syo]], secretly the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lady]] Lumiya.
